backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the school website backend with news management, contact message submission, user profiles, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, footer, about page, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key content of every page, component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, About, Admissions, Academics, StudentLife, News, Contact, and Admin pages inside the Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with Name, Current Class, Email, and Question fields, client-side validation, and backend submission via the useSubmitContactMessage hook.
frontend/src/components/ContactMessagesP: Admin panel component that fetches and displays contact form submissions sorted by newest first, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/DepartmentCard.t: Presentational card component that displays a school department's icon, title, description, and list of key courses.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main site layout component providing a sticky navigation header, top info bar with social links, footer, and wrapping all pages with auth state and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state during authentication and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NewsCard.tsx: Presentational card component that renders a news item with a placeholder image, formatted date, title, summary, and a 'Read More' button.
frontend/src/components/NewsManagementPa: Admin panel for managing news articles, featuring a validated form to add new articles and a list of existing news items with formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that appears after a user authenticates via Internet Identity and has no profile, prompting them to enter their name to complete setup.
frontend/src/components/StaffCard.tsx: Presentational card component that displays a staff member's auto-generated initials avatar, name, role, department badge, and bio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching news, contact info, user profiles, admin messages, and mutations for submitting messages, adding news, and saving profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a light/dark color theme using an indigo/violet and amber palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying the school's story, mission, and core values (Curiosity, Respect, Integrity, Excellence) using cards and styled sections.
frontend/src/pages/Academics.tsx: Static Academics page showcasing department cards for Science & Tech, Humanities & Commerce, and Exam Prep, along with curriculum highlights and key statistics.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users or a tabbed panel with News and Contact Messages management for authenticated users, using Internet Identity for auth.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Static admissions page displaying a 4-step application journey, document requirements, and a call-to-action linking to the contact page.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page showing school address, phone, email, office hours, and a contact form component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage featuring a hero banner, school stats, feature highlights, announcements, latest news fetched from the backend, and student testimonials.
frontend/src/pages/News.tsx: News listing page that fetches all news items from the backend and supports client-side search filtering, with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/StudentLife.tsx: Static student life page showcasing extracurricular activities (sports, arts, tech, debate) in a card grid with tags and a call-to-action for admissions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage support for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), and an extended color palette using OKLCH variables including school-specific indigo and amber palettes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Doon's Public School website tracking schema version, implemented features, architectural notes, and known issues across a multi-page site with Internet Identity auth and an admin portal.
